{{Infobox starship
| name = The Reliable
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Reliable is a unique sea vessel characterized by its appearance as an animated, floating conch shell that has expanded into the form of a ship. According to [[Guild]] legends, the vessel is unsinkable. The ship was tasked with transporting a significant item to [[Jorin]] for secure burial following its discovery by [[Loreli]], but the mission was interrupted when the vessel became trapped by the vegetation of a roaming island. The ship's structure was seized by jungle vines and trees, causing it to tilt against the shoreline. While the vessel is capable of being launched without its captain, it cannot be sailed effectively under such circumstances. Following an incident where the cargo was lost upon reaching the [[island]], only three members of the crew survived to meet with [[Calder]].}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Reliable is a [[Navigator]] ship commanded by [[Captain Tommison]]. Resembling an animated, floating conch shell, the vessel is shaped like a giant shell. There are indications that the ship's crew may be located within the tower.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Reliable]] is a ship commanded by [[Captain Tommison]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Reliable]] is described as looking like a floating, animated conch shell.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Reliable]] is a [[Navigator]] ship that looks like a giant conch shell.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Reliable]] is a ship.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Reliable]] is a ship whose crew may be in the tower.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Reliable]] is a crew or ship.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
